programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Val learns that her tattoo refers to a barman from her holiday, and Bonnie forces her into an all-day drinking session in return for keeping it from Eric. Doug drowns his sorrows.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Paul uncovers Bonnie's deception and tells her to leave the village. Jo enjoys a stress-free day with Andy, and Laurel is shocked by Doug's behaviour when he buys a sports car.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Tony smooth-talks his way into Sally's good books and gets a surveyor to value the garage. Marcus investigates college courses, while Maria begins to resent Liam's life of leisure.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Fired up by Kevin's refusal to do a deal, Tony draws an unsuspecting Rosie into his latest scheme and Sean gets a rude awakening when he returns to work after a boozy lunch break.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Police drama series. The police investigate a case of hit and run - and Maggie is the chief suspect. Greengrass dabbles in taxidermy, and Jo has a proposal for Nick.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. After being sacked, a man goes berserk but Greengrass has a plan. Aidensfield becomes the location for a fashion photo shoot.
